allow: Bash(cd wiki/howto && mkdir -p sales broker-workspace it crm && ls -la)
Bash(mv crm-*.md crm/ && ls -la crm/ && echo "✅ CRM files moved")
Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\AlexanderThiel\\ObsidianVaults\\clesen-kb" && ls -1 raw/*.md | sort > /tmp/current_files.txt && cat /tmp/current_files.txt | tail -20)

Bash(for file in wiki/howto/crm/crm-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/items/growing-stages-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/production/prod-order-posting-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/production/prod-order-task-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/purchasing/purchase-receipt-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/sales/rapid-order-entry-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/sales/sales-planning-it-troubleshooting.md wiki/howto/sales/sales-process-history-it-troubleshooting.md; do

done)
